nasb.text: He who blesses his friend with a loud voice early in the morning, It will be reckoned a curse to him.

esv.text: Whoever blesses his neighbor with a loud voice, rising early in the morning, will be counted as cursing.

cnv.text: 清晨起來大聲為鄰舍祝福的， 就等於是咒詛他。

ccb.text: 清早高声为邻舍祝福， 无异于咒诅他。

csbs.text: 清早起来大声祝福邻人， 就被算为对他的诅咒。
